text:
Market today: Oil prices are surging past $97 due to escalating geopolitical tensions. This usually signals broader market risk-off sentiment, which can put pressure on your growth-focused tech and chip names.

Your holdings: SOXL (-36.74%) and SPAL (-55.27%) are in dire straits. Both are leveraged ETFs, meaning their drops are amplified, especially on margin. QQQ (-1.3%) and QQQI (-3.67%) are also flagged for trimming.

Watch: Keep a close eye on oil price movements and any further escalation in geopolitical tensions. Also, monitor how Wall Street reacts to tech's AI spending vs. growth narrative.

Bottom line: Extreme caution and aggressive risk management are critical right now, especially with your leveraged positions.
plays: SOXL is a SELL at -36.74% loss. Given its leveraged nature and deep loss, consider exiting to preserve capital.
SPAL is a NEW position with a -55.27% loss. It's a leveraged ETF and already far below its stop; consider cutting losses quickly.
No new buys today - hold and watch. The current market sentiment and your existing leveraged exposure suggest focusing on defense.
